SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.
This fixture uses curly/smart quotes and the prime/double-prime symbols.

Part of the Southeast Quarter of Section 16, Township 16 North, Range 3 East,
Marion County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence N 45°15’22” E, 200.00’;
thence S 44°44’38” E, 200.00’;
thence S 45°15’22” W, 200.00’;
thence N 44°44’38” W, 200.00’ to the Point of Beginning, more or less.
